title: Pittsburgh Bars Showing Up On Instagram
subtitle: Five rooms doing the work this quarter, ranked by what's on the feed.
angle: The Pittsburgh bars and breweries with active Instagram feeds this quarter, ranked by cadence and the kind of programming the feed actually shows.
intro:
Hop Farm posted twelve times in the last thirty days. Hidden Harbor posted twelve times too. Both are doing the kind of consistent, room-matching, this-is-what-Tuesday-looks-like work almost no Pittsburgh bar bothers with. The other three on this list are doing some version of the same thing.

Pittsburgh's bar scene is loud in person and famously quiet online. These five rooms are the exception. Hop Farm in Lawrenceville is the most consistent of the group, leaning hard on the trivia-and-music programming that has defined the urban farmhouse since opening. Hidden Harbor in Squirrel Hill is matching that cadence with tiki content that travels: close-ups of cocktail glassware, themed nights, the kind of feed that explains why creators keep filming there. Golden Age, the German and Czech lager house, is using Instagram to roll out the next chapter. The new Garden Theater concept on the North Side, ahead of opening.

This is the short list of bars whose feed matches the room. Issue 02 will tell you who joins them.

items.name: Hop Farm Brewing Company
items.descriptor: Twelve posts in thirty days, four of them reels, programming the urban farmhouse like clockwork.
items.stat_line: 298 reviews · 4.6★ · weekly trivia and Music Thursdays on the feed

items.name: Hidden Harbor
items.descriptor: Tiki content that travels. Glassware, themed nights, and a decade in the neighborhood on display.
items.stat_line: 765 reviews · 4.6★ · twelve posts in the last 30 days

items.name: Golden Age Beer Company
items.descriptor: German and Czech lagers, and a Garden Theater reveal the feed is pacing out week by week.
items.stat_line: 188 reviews · 4.8★ · twelve posts in the last 30 days, the North Side expansion in motion

items.name: Lorelei
items.descriptor: Alpine cocktails, wood-fired pizzas, and a Mid-Century Mondays run that started on Instagram.
items.stat_line: 391 reviews · 4.5★ · four posts in the last 30 days, programming-led

items.name: Commerce Bar
items.descriptor: A hidden cocktail bar with fourteen thousand followers, posting sparingly and letting the mystery carry the feed.
items.stat_line: 106 reviews · 4.7★ · the East Liberty cocktail room, no reservations
